description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease with this pair of slippers from enroute. Pair it with any kind of western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.Heel: 1"UpperSoft midfoot leather strap with a toe separatorCushioned nubuck footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with wave-shaped grooves for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe the leather surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtClean the footbed using a nubuck brushUse a branded leather conditioner on the straps if necessaryDo not store in direct sunlight
